todos.text: Step 1: Set up test environment and fixtures for the feature
Step 2: Write unit tests for core logic, edge cases, and error handling paths
Step 3: Perform integration and manual smoke tests, then document results

Step 3: Perform integration and manual smoke tests, then document results
